competitor.name: Curl Lab AI
competitor.tagline: Same hands. Same neighborhood. Always replies in 4 minutes.

review_replies.reply: Stephanie, you're right — getting a chair shouldn't take three DMs. We're putting in a real booking system this month, and your color is still on us next time as an apology for the front-desk mess. Text 415-555-0188 and ask for Sofía. — Sol & Trenza
Bianca, thank you. Curly hair deserves curly-hair specialists, and you and your sister will always have a chair here. See you both soon. — Sofía
Devon — four DMs is four too many for no reply. We're rebuilding how we handle inbound and we'd love a chance to make it right. If you ever want to come back, your first appointment is on us. — Sofía
Hi Amber! Yes — Saturday at 11am or 2pm both open for color. I'll save the 2pm for your niece if that works. Sending you the deposit link now. Excited for prom! 🌟 — Sofía

instagram_posts.caption: Curly hair Tuesday. Before/after with Bianca — protein treatment + dry-cut shape. Curls came back to life in 90 minutes. DMs open for color consults this week.
Bridal trial season is HERE. We have 6 Saturdays open between June and September. If you're getting married this year and your dream is curls or updos, slide in our DMs — we'll lock you in.
Saturday energy at Sol y Trenza. Three quinceañeras in the book this summer. POV: when the abuelas cry, you know it's right.

invoice_chasers.message: Hi Adriana! 🤍 Just a friendly nudge on the bridal trial invoice from April 22 ($180). No rush — totally understand wedding planning is a lot. Want me to send a Zelle link to make it easy? Excited for July 18! — Sofía
Hi Lucia! Friendly reminder on the bridal trial from May 4 ($180) — Zelle link below if that's easiest. Thanks for trusting me with your day. — Sofía
Hola Rosa — quick reminder on invoice for the Galleria quince ($1,200). Confirmed by you for Zelle this Friday — just keeping it on your radar. ¡Gracias siempre! — Sofía

output.weekly_summary: Curl Lab replied to every DM and review in under 4 minutes, captured 38 bookings, and collected $1,560 in receivables — while Sol & Trenza let 27 DMs sit and lost 3 bridal leads to faster competitors.
